uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report; signed centi-deg C 0x08CA=2250 -> 22.50 C. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable temperature_1) and mapping to air.temperature per the ZCL temperature cluster.
Synthetic in-bounds standard report; unsigned centi-% 0x157C=5500 -> 55.00 %. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable humidity_1) and mapping to air.relativeHumidity.
Synthetic in-bounds standard report; signed16 hPa 0x03F5=1013, within atmospheric bound 900-1100. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable pressure).

uplink.description: CO2 standard report on endpoint 1 (cluster 0x800C, 650 ppm) | payload:210A800C000021028A
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report; byte0=0x21 -> ZCL endpoint 1, so cluster 0x800C is CO2 (not IAQ). unsigned16 0x028A=650 ppm. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable CO2) and mapping to air.co2.

uplink.description: IAQ standard report on endpoint 0 (cluster 0x800C, index 25) | payload:110A800C0000210019
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input; byte0=0x11 -> ZCL endpoint 0, so cluster 0x800C is the unitless IAQ index. expected.data: reference/upstream-codec.js emits variable IAQ=25; the vocabulary does not model IAQ, so it is the camelCase extra `iaq`.
Synthetic in-bounds standard report; unsigned16 0x00A0=160 lux. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable illuminance) and mapping to air.lightIntensity.

Synthetic in-bounds standard report; boolean 0x01 -> occupied. expected.data: reference/upstream-codec.js emits variable occupancy=true; no vocabulary key models occupancy, so it is the camelCase extra `occupancy`.

uplink.description: case violation standard report (cluster 0x000F attr 0x0055, true) | payload:110A000F00551001
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input (state the case). expected.data: reference/upstream-codec.js emits variable violation_detection=true; no vocabulary key, so the camelCase extra `violationDetection`.

uplink.description: battery / power standard report (cluster 0x0050 attr 6, disposable 3.688 V) | payload:110A00500006410503040E6804
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input. Flags byte selects the disposable-battery source; mV 0x0E68=3688 -> 3.688 V. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable disposable_battery_voltage) and mapping to the volts vocabulary key battery.

uplink.description: firmware version read-attribute response (cmd 0x01, cluster 0, attr 2) | payload:110100000002000D0305020015E2
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input. Firmware is three decimal octets then a 24-bit build (0*65536+21*256+226=5602). expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable firmware); surfaced as the camelCase extra `firmware`.

uplink.description: message type read-attribute response (cmd 0x01, cluster 0x8004, unconfirmed) | payload:110180040000000800
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input (dataup info). Value byte 0 -> unconfirmed. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable message_type); surfaced as the camelCase extra `messageType`.

uplink.description: Huffman batch frame -> error (frame-control bit0 clear) | payload:30b200b6e7c7004d8887202fda75b914b4b28276cbf26e59bb5bd6ed96e5ddb2948076cb9200f6
uplink._note: Upstream TTN batch example input. byte0=0x30 has bit0 clear -> proprietary Huffman batch frame, which this codec does not decode (standard reports only) -> error.
Synthetic negative case: Watteco standard reports arrive on fPort 125; any other port is rejected.
Synthetic negative case: a well-formed standard report on a cluster (0x0102) this codec does not map is rejected.
